description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden frame with open slatted sides and a flat, slatted load platform. It is supported by two large, spoked wheels made of wood with reinforced rims, positioned on either side of the cart. The front of the cart has two extended wooden handles for manual pulling or pushing, while the rear is enclosed by a short wooden gate. The side rails are constructed from horizontal wooden slats, providing containment for cargo while allowing visibility and airflow. The overall finish is matte, with a natural wood color dominating the structure and darker accents on the wheels. The design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or materials in urban environments such as parks, markets, or residential areas.
description: A wooden handcart with open slatted sides, two large spoked wheels, and dual front handles for manual transport. The cart has a flat, slatted load platform and a matte, natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual wooden handles extending forward and the open slatted platform between the side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two large spoked wheels, the open slatted side rails, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short wooden gate and the open slatted platform, with the wheels partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wheels, side rails, and the handles extending from the front.
